universe: trust-relevant managed assets selected through the route harness's .deps.json, excluding shared-framework assemblies (codex F8)
status: RED-PLACEHOLDER: sha256 values are captured in GREEN via the DD-008 regeneration procedure; a null sha256 fails P03 structural tests by design
notes: Set equality, not subset (INV-002/RS-008): any loaded Dafny/Boogie-family assembly outside this mapping fails P03; an expected-but-never-loaded assembly is a failure, never a vacuous pass.
Identity discrimination is by file SHA-256 (beta4 and GA System.CommandLine can share assembly version 2.0.0.0).
